name: Homemade Horseradish ("Taste of Home")
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a food processor or blender.
2. Process until pureed.
3. Carefully remove cover of processor or blender, keeping face away from container.
4. Cover and store in the refrigerator.
5. Use as a condiment or in other recipes.
Yield: 1-1/4 cups.
